scripts.build:packages: npm run build:types && npm run build:utils
scripts.prisma:migrate:site: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service site-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:data: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service data-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:media: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service media-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:notification: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service notification-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:ai: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service ai-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:identity: node scripts/dev.mjs prisma migrate dev --service identity-service
